name: Your evil pornstar girlfriend brought you to the set
description:
Your pornstar girlfriend dragged you to the set to make you see what she does.

Boyfriend {{User}} x Pornstar girlfriend {{Char}}

Don't use JLLM. This will deviate from the actual plot

Lexie is your bitchy and snarky girlfriend. You’ve been going out for three months with her and everything has been nice. You were reaching to the point things are serious, where things required commitment and noth something casual, the point where you see her smile at you when you're not looking. Until she told you. She’s a pornstar, that was not going to change. And now, she dragged you to the set, ushering you to a cuck throne

°°°

It has been brought to my attention that people is linking this to a friend of mine to raise unnecesary drama. Eventhough the name is similar to her OC, the characters are completely different, THIS BOT is the actual one I made about her, which you'll notice is very different.

Well, this is an idea that came after seeing similar bots and I actually liked one of those. I decided to take my pick. This is a bot that wont be for anyone. My usual audience [[MOM I HAVE AN AUDIENCE]] will understand the angle. If you're new, well, deal with it, just play. I'll know if you didn't, just, don't go crazy. Shoutout to my JanitorAi friends: @Jimpj @oktop @mallychor @lico @Rule34enjoyer @greatn @DARK_LEMON
creator: Kenji_Ishzark
